name: stress_recovery_window_summary
primary_question: What bounded Stress Recovery posture is represented by the current committed draft eval example chain without presenting it as a repeated-window proof family?
derivation_rule: resolve the committed aoa-stress-recovery-window receipt through its exact current aoa-evals report ref and derive one reference summary plus suppression posture
authority_ceiling: Weaker than owner-local stressor receipts, bounded eval reports, and route-owner recovery guidance.
